Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Training.asp

# SBDC Training Events Process

## Training process
The UH SBDC training section separates in-person events, webinars, Spanish webinars, and trainer applications.

## How BOSS should route
- If the user wants structured learning: route to Training.
- If the user is near Houston and wants live interaction: route to In-Person Events and filter by location/topic.
- If the user needs flexible learning: route to Webinars and filter by topic/format.
- If the user prefers Spanish: route to Spanish Webinars.
- If the user is a subject-matter expert wanting to teach entrepreneurs: route to Become a Trainer.

## Dynamic-content warning
Event calendars change. BOSS should provide the official event page link rather than claiming a specific class date unless the date was verified during the live conversation.
